# Gajae Workflow Parity Matrix

Wave 1 behavioral/protocol parity inventory for ASA runtime workflow harness work. This matrix records contracts only; it does not copy Gajae source code.

| ID | Gajae reference | Behavioral contract | ASA target | Tests | Status | Verification evidence |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| workflow_gate_flat_shape | `//wsl$/Ubuntu/tmp/gajae-code/python/gjc-rpc/tests/test_protocol.py:200-217`, `//wsl$/Ubuntu/tmp/gajae-code/python/gjc-rpc/tests/test_protocol.py:324-342` | Flat non-event `workflow_gate` frames carry `gate_id`, `stage`, `kind`, `schema`, `schema_hash`, `context`, `created_at`, and `options`. | `workflow_harness.py`; planned `workflow_runtime.py`; planned `test_workflow_gate_protocol.py` | `tests/test_workflow_parity_matrix.py`; planned flat gate protocol test | pending_implementation | `.omo/evidence/task-2-parity-green.log` |
| wrapped_event_envelope | `//wsl$/Ubuntu/tmp/gajae-code/python/gjc-rpc/README.md:260-273` | Canonical runtime events are wrapped in `type=event` frames; non-event frames such as `workflow_gate` remain flat. | `agent_loop.py`; `provider_tool_choice_model.py`; planned protocol tests | `tests/test_workflow_parity_matrix.py`; planned event envelope test | pending_implementation | `.omo/evidence/task-2-parity-green.log` |
| ralplan_approval_gate_parsing | `//wsl$/Ubuntu/tmp/gajae-code/python/gjc-rpc/tests/test_protocol.py:304-342` | `ralplan:approval` gates preserve approval kind, boolean schema, options, and context for gate response handling. | planned `workflow_runtime.py`; planned `test_ralplan_runtime.py`; planned `test_workflow_gate_protocol.py` | `tests/test_workflow_parity_matrix.py`; planned ralplan approval test | pending_implementation | `.omo/evidence/task-2-parity-green.log` |

| deep_interview_one_question_gate | `//wsl$/Ubuntu/tmp/gajae-code/python/gjc-rpc/tests/test_client.py:360-376` | Question-style gates carry input context; ASA deep-interview must issue one pending question gate per round. | planned `workflow_runtime.py`; planned `test_deep_interview_runtime.py` | `tests/test_workflow_parity_matrix.py`; planned one-question gate test | pending_implementation | `.omo/evidence/task-2-parity-green.log` |
| action_lifecycle_first_valid_resolution | `//wsl$/Ubuntu/tmp/gajae-code/crates/gjc-notifications/src/actions.rs:52-237` | First valid resolution wins; duplicate/idempotent replies, conflicts, unknown actions, already answered actions, and resolver-unavailable paths have explicit outcomes. | planned `workflow_runtime.py`; planned `agent_runtime_tools.py`; planned gate protocol tests | `tests/test_workflow_parity_matrix.py`; planned lifecycle rejection/idempotency test | pending_implementation | `.omo/evidence/task-2-parity-green.log` |
| task_goal_context_summaries | `//wsl$/Ubuntu/tmp/gajae-code/crates/gjc-notifications/src/protocol.rs:242-256` | Context updates can include last message plus task and goal summaries; ASA workflow state should expose task/goal summary fields to prompt/tool/TUI surfaces. | planned `workflow_runtime.py`; planned `tui_agent_activity.py`; planned TUI activity tests | `tests/test_workflow_parity_matrix.py`; planned context rendering test | pending_implementation | `.omo/evidence/task-2-parity-green.log` |
